series_metadata.series_description: Contracts, memoranda, rights of entry, and other agreements for access, utilities, construction, and improvements.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain for the latter of 5 years after contract expires (including any extension or renewal) or upon final resolution if litigation, claim, or audit is initiated. ; Electronic: Retain for the latter of 5 years after contract expires (including any extension or renewal) or upon final resolution if litigation, claim, or audit is initiated.OAKS: 3 bienna plus current year. ; Paper: Retain for the latter of 5 years after contract expires (including any extension or renewal) or upon final resolution if litigation, claim, or audit is initiated. If paper copy is scanned and saved in an electronic format or micro-form, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time., Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
